name: Winshear Gold Corp.
summary: Winshear Gold Corp. engages in the exploration and development of the Gaban Gold project and the Tinka Iron Oxide Copper Gold project in Peru. It holds 100% interest in the Gaban Gold project covering an area of 187 square kilometers located in the San Gaban District of Puno; and the Tinka Iron Oxide Copper Gold project covering an area of 18 square kilometers located in the Ica Department, Southern Peru. The company was formerly known as Helio Resource Corp. and changed its name to Winshear Gold Corp. in January 2020. Winshear Gold Corp. was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
